label: Scenario 1 — Aligned: coupon code, payments only

intent.title: Add coupon code support at checkout
intent.raw_context: Users should be able to enter a coupon code at checkout. The discount should be applied before the final charge is processed. Changes are scoped to the payment service only.
acceptance_criteria: A coupon code input field is visible on the checkout screen
Valid codes apply the correct discount to the total
Invalid codes return a user-friendly error
All changes are contained within payment_service

execution.title: INT-401: Add coupon code to checkout flow
execution.summary: Implements coupon code input and discount logic. All changes in payment_service.

changeset.diff_summary: Added coupon validation logic and discount application in payment_service. No other services touched.
